iran_nuke.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 100. 440kg HEU still under IAEA monitoring. Hidden HEU in underground facility unresolved. Araghchi confirms stockpile. No diplomatic path. Nuclear test not conducted but breakout capability remains.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 19 01:00 - IMMINENT 100. UAE fully closes airspace. 200 US troops wounded (180 returned to duty). Dubai airport fire contained, limited flights resumed. Fujairah industrial zone drone strike fire. Israel plans 'thousands' of targets next 3 weeks. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact, hasn't fired post-12-day-war missiles. Trump claims Iran drone factories hit, says 'very little firepower left' — contradicts IRGC. Iran FM again rejects ceasefire on CBS. 1,444 Iran dead, 18,551 injured.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 19 01:00 - IMMINENT 100. Lebanon displaced exceeds 1 million. 5 Western leaders (CA/FR/DE/IT/UK) urge Israel not to invade, warn 'devastating humanitarian consequences.' 8 wounded in drone/rocket barrage on northern Israel. Israel committed to 3-week campaign.

turkey.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 92. NATO strain deepening. EU "no appetite" for Red Sea naval mission extension. Trump threatens NATO over Hormuz. Multiple NATO missile intercepts over Turkey remain unresolved.

india.notes: Day 19 00:00 - ELEVATED 25. India evacuates nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing act. Pakistan-Afghanistan war next door increasing regional pressure. No direct escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 87. Russia continues arms support to Iran. Ukraine peace talks frozen due to ME war. No direct ME intervention yet but strategic exploitation ongoing.

china.notes: Day 19 00:00 - CRITICAL 42. China coast guard blockade rehearsals. Large-scale military flights resume near Taiwan. Taiwan announces $40B defense budget. Trump Beijing visit March 31 confirmed by WH.

north_korea.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 78. 10 MRL missiles fired March 14 during US-SK drills. Kim observed with daughter. Exploiting US security gap in ME. No new signals since update.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 100. Russia escalates Kharkiv offensive. Biden surprise Kyiv visit. 97 drones launched. Ukraine recaptured 400km2 in Feb (first month gains > losses since 2024). Storm Shadow hits Bryansk electronics factory. 6 killed in air attacks.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 100. Pakistan strikes Kabul hospital - Afghanistan claims 400 killed. UNSC resolution passed. China mediates. Open war confirmed. Civilian toll now 475+ dead across conflict.

top_signals: UAE fully closes airspace as 'exceptional precautionary measure' — first full closure since conflict began
200 US troops wounded in Iran war, 180 returned to duty — CENTCOM confirms
Israel plans to strike 'thousands' of targets over next 3 weeks — escalation commitment
IRGC claims most weapons cache intact, hasn't yet fired missiles produced since 12-day war with Israel
Dubai airport fire contained, limited flights resume; Fujairah industrial zone also struck
Pakistan strikes Kabul hospital — Afghanistan claims 400 killed
Israel launches new wave of strikes on Tehran — Iran FM rejects all ceasefire claims
Russia escalates Kharkiv offensive, launches 97 drones; Biden makes surprise Kyiv visit
5 Western leaders urge Israel not to invade Lebanon — displaced exceeds 1 million
Trump claims Iran wants to negotiate — Iran FM Araghchi: 'We never asked for ceasefire or negotiation'

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 19 00:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all theaters. Pakistan-Afghanistan hospital strike is worst single event of that conflict. Iran FM explicitly rejects ceasefire. China mediating Pak-Afg is only diplomatic signal but no ceasefire materialized. All conflicts intensifying.

latest_news.headline: UAE fully closes airspace — 'exceptional precautionary measure'
latest_news.text: UAE General Civil Aviation Authority announces full temporary airspace closure. Defense ministry confirms responding to incoming missile and drone threats from Iran.

latest_news.headline: 200 US troops wounded in Iran war — CENTCOM
latest_news.text: US Central Command confirms ~200 troops wounded, vast majority minor injuries, 180 returned to duty. Conflict entering third week.

latest_news.headline: Israel plans 'thousands' of targets over next 3 weeks
latest_news.text: Israel tells CNN it plans to strike thousands of targets over next 3 weeks, with potentially more to follow. Trump admin expects conflict 'within weeks or sooner.'

latest_news.headline: IRGC claims most weapons cache intact, hasn't fired post-war missiles
latest_news.text: IRGC spokesperson says most weapons cache remains intact. Missiles used in war are from 'a decade ago' — Iran has not yet fired missiles produced since 12-day war with Israel.

latest_news.headline: Dubai airport fire contained, limited flights resume
latest_news.text: Dubai authorities contain fire near airport after drone strike on fuel tank. Emirates resumes limited flights, several routes cancelled.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan strikes Kabul hospital — Afghanistan claims 400 killed
latest_news.text: Pakistan strikes Omar Addiction Treatment Hospital in Kabul. Afghanistan claims 400 killed, 250 injured. Taliban calls it 'crime against humanity.'

latest_news.headline: 5 Western leaders urge Israel not to invade Lebanon
latest_news.text: Canada, France, Germany, Italy, UK urge Israel not to invade Lebanon. Warn 'devastating humanitarian consequences.' Lebanon displaced exceeds 1 million.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 19 00:04) - Global war probability 100%. Seven zones at/near IMMINENT. Iran war grinds on Day 19 — missile capacity degraded but strategic firing continues. Qatar urges de-escalation but no response. DPRK exploits security gap with new MRL test. Pakistan-Afghanistan civilian toll mounting (75+ dead, 115K displaced). No ceasefire frameworks in any theater. Oil declining but strategic situation unchanged.
